creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #3)
> The file VERSION from the source reads "8.2". We got from 8.0 to 8.2 simply because there was no version 8.1 released.

Sorry. But for some reason. The copy I downloaded from the
same links now in the Makefile. Had listed 8.0 in VERSION.
I have no explanation as to why/how. But just thought I'd
mention it. So you'd know why I kept asking about it.
Thanks for everything.

--Chris
